name: PAGA Trajectory Inference

groups.guidance: obs key with cluster labels. PAGA computes connectivity between these groups.

model.guidance: PAGA model version. v1.2 is more robust.

validation.check: PAGA graph should be connected (all clusters reachable). Disconnected components may indicate over-clustering or truly distinct populations.

notes: PAGA provides a coarse-grained trajectory graph at the cluster level. Useful for identifying plausible lineage relationships before running pseudotime. Combine with sc.pl.paga for visualization and sc.tl.draw_graph for force-directed layouts initialized by PAGA.
